seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Khon Kaen 2026 — Budget to Luxury
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotel in Khon Kaen for your budget. Our 2026 guide covers 10 top-rated properties from budget guesthouses to 5-star luxury — with real THB prices, locations and honest tips.

intro: As Isaan's largest city and a major university and business hub, Khon Kaen has a surprisingly good hotel scene — better than most northeastern Thai cities. You will find genuine 5-star properties like the Avani and Pullman alongside solid mid-range business hotels and clean budget options catering to the steady flow of domestic business travellers and university visitors. Prices are significantly lower than Bangkok or tourist destinations in the south. Below are 10 properties we recommend across budget, mid-range and luxury categories.

hotels.name: Avani Khon Kaen Hotel & Convention Centre
hotels.description: The top luxury option in Khon Kaen — a 5-star property with elegant modern rooms, an extensive convention centre, full-service spa with traditional Thai massage, a large outdoor pool with sun loungers and cabanas, and multiple dining options including Thai and international restaurants. The hotel caters to both business travellers and tourists and maintains international standards you would expect from the Avani brand.
highlights: 5-star facilities with large swimming pool and spa
Convention centre — one of the best-equipped in Isaan
Central location near Central Plaza and Bueng Kaen Nakhon
Multiple restaurants including Thai and international cuisine
Professional English-speaking staff

hotels.name: Pullman Khon Kaen Raja Orchid
hotels.description: A well-established 4.5-star hotel (formerly Sofitel Raja Orchid) that has been Khon Kaen's premier property for years. Features spacious rooms with city views, an outdoor swimming pool, fitness centre, spa with in-room massage options, and several restaurants including a popular breakfast buffet. The hotel shows some age compared to the Avani but compensates with larger rooms, a loyal following and consistently good service.
highlights: Spacious rooms — among the largest in Khon Kaen
Excellent breakfast buffet with Thai and international options
Swimming pool and well-equipped fitness centre
Central location on the main commercial street
Long-established reputation — reliable and professional

sources.sourceName: Pullman Khon Kaen Raja Orchid — Official

hotels.name: Glacé Hotel Khon Kaen
hotels.description: A newer boutique-style hotel that brings a fresh, contemporary design aesthetic to Khon Kaen's accommodation scene. Rooms are sleek and modern with quality bedding, rain showers and smart TVs. The rooftop bar offers cocktails with views over the city — something few other Khon Kaen hotels provide. A great choice for design-conscious travellers who want something more stylish than the traditional business hotels.
highlights: Modern boutique design — the most stylish hotel in Khon Kaen
Rooftop bar with city views
Quality bedding and rain showers in all rooms
Good restaurant with creative Thai-fusion menu
Newer property — everything is fresh and well-maintained

sources.sourceName: Ted's Guide — Luxury Hotels Khon Kaen

hotels.name: Ad Lib Hotel Khon Kaen
hotels.description: One of Khon Kaen's best-reviewed mid-range hotels, Ad Lib delivers a polished experience at a fair price. Modern rooms with comfortable beds, a good on-site restaurant, outdoor swimming pool, bar and free parking. The buffet breakfast is well-regarded by guests. Located near Central Plaza, making it convenient for both shopping and sightseeing.
highlights: Highly rated by guests (9.2/10 on momondo)
Outdoor swimming pool
Good on-site restaurant and bar
Free parking — useful if you are renting a car for day trips
Walking distance to Central Plaza Khon Kaen

hotels.name: Nadee 10 Resort & Hotel
hotels.description: A 4-star resort-style hotel with a garden setting, indoor pool and bar. Rooms are air-conditioned with modern amenities and room service. The property has a relaxed, resort-like atmosphere that feels like an escape from the city — unusual for a centrally located Khon Kaen hotel. Good value for the quality on offer.
highlights: Resort-style atmosphere with garden setting
Indoor swimming pool — usable year-round
Bar and room service available
Quiet despite central location
Good value for a 4-star property

hotels.name: I-Hotel Khon Kaen
hotels.description: A modern mid-range hotel on the main Mittraphap highway that cuts through Khon Kaen. Clean, functional rooms with good Wi-Fi, air conditioning and en-suite bathrooms. The hotel caters primarily to domestic business travellers and offers reliable quality without frills. Close to Ton Tann Night Market and several restaurants along Mittraphap Road.
highlights: Clean and modern rooms with reliable Wi-Fi
Close to Ton Tann Night Market
Free parking
On-site restaurant with Thai and international options
Good base for exploring central Khon Kaen

hotels.name: Charoen Thani Khon Kaen Hotel
hotels.description: A long-established Khon Kaen landmark hotel that has served the city for decades. While the decor is dated, the rooms are spacious, clean and well-maintained. The central Srichan Road location puts you within walking distance of Walking Street, local markets and several temples. The hotel's Thai restaurant is popular with locals — always a good sign.
highlights: Central location on Srichan Road — walkable to key attractions
Spacious rooms at affordable prices
Popular on-site Thai restaurant
Swimming pool
Long-established — reliable and consistent

hotels.name: Roma Hotel Khon Kaen
hotels.description: A solid 3-star budget hotel offering clean air-conditioned rooms with hot showers, Wi-Fi and a convenient central location near Bueng Kaen Nakhon lake and Wat Nong Wang. The rooms are simple but well-maintained, and the price-to-quality ratio is hard to beat. A reliable choice for budget travellers who want a proper hotel room rather than a hostel.
highlights: Central location near Bueng Kaen Nakhon and Wat Nong Wang
Clean air-conditioned rooms with hot showers
Excellent value — proper hotel quality at budget prices
Free Wi-Fi throughout
Walking distance to lakeside restaurants

hotels.name: Nuchjaree Place
hotels.description: A clean and cheerful 2-star hotel near Khon Kaen University, popular with visiting academics, students' families and budget travellers. Rooms are basic but tidy with air conditioning, Wi-Fi and private bathrooms. The university area location means plenty of cheap restaurants and cafes nearby. One of the cheapest proper hotel options in Khon Kaen.
highlights: One of the cheapest hotels in Khon Kaen
Clean rooms with air conditioning and Wi-Fi
Near Khon Kaen University with many cheap eateries
Friendly staff
Quiet neighbourhood

hotels.name: Kosa Hotel Khon Kaen
hotels.description: A well-known older hotel in central Khon Kaen that has been a city institution for years. The rooms are dated but clean and spacious, and the location on Srichan Road is excellent for accessing the walking street market, local restaurants and city temples. The on-site restaurant serves decent Thai food, and the swimming pool is a bonus at this price point.
highlights: Prime Srichan Road location — walkable to Walking Street
Swimming pool — rare at this price range
Spacious rooms despite dated decor
On-site Thai restaurant
Long-established — well-known locally

sources.sourceName: Tripadvisor — Best Hotels in Khon Kaen
